chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَمُوتُ وَ لَا يَتْرُكُ إِلَّا امْرَأَتَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – The man dies and does not leave (anyone) except his wife

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/186)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/186)
text: رَجُلٍ تُوُفِّيَ وَ تَرَكَ امْرَأَتَهُ فَقَالَ لِلْمَرْأَةِ الرُّبُعُ وَ مَا بَقِيَ فَلِلْإِمَامِ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, from Wuheyb Bin Hafs, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who passed away and left his wife. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For the woman is the one-quarter, and whatever remains, so it is for the Imam<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 3. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad from Wuhayb ibn Hafs from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “About the case of a woman who dies and leaves behind her husband, abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One-fourth belongs to the woman and the rest belongs to the Imam.’”
